13.feedbackRight: Right! Good job! All new or old social media accounts affiliated with Indiana State University must be registered. As part of the registration process, it is required that you provide the name, phone number and email address for the account manager and a backup manager(s), as well as account information.

15.theQuestion: To ensure that your social media texts are accessible for people with disabilities:
answer_choices: It needs to be free of acronyms, jargons and abbreviations.

16.feedbackRight: Right! Good job! To ensure that your social media posts are accessible for people with disabilities, alternate (alt) text needs to be added for the image if the platform supports it, or an image description should be included at the end of the post if the platform does not support alt text.
16.theQuestion: To make your social media photo accessible, an alternate text needs to be added for the image if the platform supports it, or the photo description should be included at the end of the post if the platform does not support alt text.
16.feedbackWrong: Sorry, incorrect answer. Remember that alternate (alt) text needs to be added for the image if the platform supports it, or an image description should be included at the end of the post if the platform does not support alt text.

1.feedbackRight: Right! Good job! As part of the University's Social Media Guidelines and Expectations, departments and units are asked to complete the Social Media Account Registration Form prior to starting a social media account.
1.theQuestion: As part of the University's Social Media Guidelines and Expectations, departments and units are asked to complete the Social Media Account Registration Form prior to starting a social media account.
1.feedbackWrong: Sorry, incorrect answer. It is true that as a part of the University's Social Media Guidelines and Expectations, departments and units are asked to complete the Social Media Account Registration Form prior to starting a social media account.

2.theQuestion: In the administration of the account, ISU employees and units must comply with which of the the following? Select all that apply.
answer_choices: University accounts must not post about or comment on political issues but can post about personal life.
Posts should not include obscenity, copyright infringement, libel, and threats
University regulations, policies, and procedures which dictate appropriate and expected behavior.
Post only public information. Proprietary or confidential information, personal and/or private information about Indiana State University, staff, and students cannot be posted on social media
Read, obey, and comply with the Terms of Service and community guidelines on all social media platforms, e.g. Facebook community standards.
Personnel issues should not be discussed on social media.
The Indiana State logos can be used by a department or unit for official social media presence, and you do not have to seek approval from University Marketing prior to use.
University-owned computers, tablets, and devices are reserved for university-related business.
Social media administrators can share the information from University Communication's social media platforms.
Do not report inappropriate posts or accounts with university-related information to University Marketing and University Communication.

4.feedbackRight: Right! Good job! Before creating any account, you have to think about the time and commitment you need to make in order to be successful.
4.theQuestion: Before creating any account you do not have to think about the time and commitment you need to make, you can just start by creating an account.
4.feedbackWrong:
Sorry, incorrect answer.

Remember, before creating any account, you have to think about the time and commitment you need to make in order to be successful.

5.feedbackRight:
Right! Good job!

First you need to think about the commitment that needs to be made. Second, you need to secure approval from your Vice President or Cabinet Member. Third, you need to submit the Social Media Registration Form and then create a plan for the account.
5.theQuestion: Put the items in the correct order.
5.feedbackWrong:
Sorry, incorrect answer.

Remember that first you need to think about the commitment that needs to be made. Second, you need to secure approval from your Vice President or Cabinet Member. Third, you need to submit the Social Media Registration Form and then create a plan for the account.
answer_choices: Secure approval from your Vice President or Cabinet Member.
Think about the commitment that needs to be made.

6.feedbackRight: Correct! You have understood the moderating accounts correctly.
6.theQuestion: For moderating accounts in social media, do not delete comments as a way of resolving the issue. But, you can delete, hide or block comments that are:

answer_choices: incite violence or otherwise discriminatory or harassing.

7.feedbackRight:
Right! Good job!

Inactive accounts reflect poorly on the university. It can also be confusing if a department or organization has both active and inactive accounts. When people are searching for you on social media, they may only find the inactive account(s).
7.theQuestion: Inactive accounts reflect poorly on the university. It can also be confusing if a department or organization has both active and inactive accounts. When people are searching for you on social media, they may only find the inactive account(s).
7.feedbackWrong: Sorry, incorrect answer. Remember that the inactive accounts reflect poorly on the university. It can also be confusing if a department or organization has both active and inactive accounts. When people are searching for you on social media, they may only find the inactive account(s).
